case_title: AUDIT PRO, INC. VS BUQEILEH, ANTON DBA PINE & TAYLOR MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.99 FILED BY AUDIT PRO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BUQEILEH, ANTON DBA PINE & TAYLOR MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUQEILEH, ANTON DBA PINE & TAYLOR MARKET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUDIT PRO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUQEILEH, ANTON DBA PINE & TAYLOR MARKET $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, DEFT TO PAY $750 ON 5/6/96 & $750 BY 6/6/96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BUQEILEH, ANTON DBA PINE & TAYLOR MARKET
